channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken Door, 10th April
item.description:
Entrance door is not secure and anyone can enter through it at Langley Court 40-67

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked SORN in lane for multiple use of house on Moordown / Ankerdine, 10th April
item.description:
Car is parked, a long with lots of flytipping, its been there for months (car's been there for at least 3 years SORN but in public access road). The occupant no longer lives there. We are clearing our garage and garden and need access to remove rubble. The car doesnt allow any other cars down the road. Please advise on removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moordown, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical Meter cupboard Langary Court, 10th April
item.description:
The building 1-39 langary court have an issue on floor 8 and 7 eletrical cupboard door is unsecured. Can you please fixed it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Avery Hill Park near Avery Hill Road entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass all down the road, 10th April
item.description:
Lots of smashed glass all along the pavement and road up the whole road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 10th April
item.description:
Was originally outside the gate of a residential property. Then got moved to the carpark.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilbert Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tippibg, 10th April
item.description:
A range of mainly textiles dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal alleyway ankerdine crescdnt /donaldson road, 10th April
item.description:
After the bank holiday, I noticed bin bags left in alleyway outside my garden gate. It is not my rubbish. I noticed it 10th april. Some rubbish spilling out onto alleyway due to foxes. This is clearly bcos bins were full over Easter. This is not usual in our alleyway. Do we need a deterrent?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti Tapley House stairwell, 10th April
item.description:
Large area of offensive graffiti in permanent marker pen for over 2 weeks across central stairwell wall of Tapley House, Wolseley Street, SE1 2BW (ground floor to first floor stairs).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolseley Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 10th April
item.description:
Constant and ongoing issues with fly tipping next to the overflowing council bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119D, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside dexters 91 E salusury, 10th April
item.description:
Old broke boiler and bagged waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Outside 2 Donaldson on Road, 10th April
item.description:
Dentist on Road after refuse collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Strathray Gardens intersection with Lancaster Grove, 10th April
item.description:
Contractor has left roadworks barriers on pavement which obstruct pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Grove, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping/ Not the first time, 10th April
item.description:
Somebody left a drawer full of rubbish. I took a picture of a letter visible inside the rubbish pile which has the full address and name of the person who likely left it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ireland Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constantly overflowing bin, 10th April
item.description:
The dog litter bin is constantly over flowing, SE20 7XZ outside nr 28/30 Foul smell coming from bin, worse during warm days When bin is full people dump poo bags on the pavement outside property’s Dog poo on street, people are stepping in this walking passed Problem is on going, week after week this is a problem Could bin be moved to lamp post further down/up the street so not direct outside residence. It needs to be emptied more often, 2 per week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piquet Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large broken tree branch snapped off hanging in road, 10th April
item.description:
A neighbor was able to pull it off the road onto the grass verge so that it doesn't cause any accidents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge repairing, 10th April
item.description:
Grass verge scalped during recent cutting by council contractors. Requires repairing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenwood Drive, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On lampost, 10th April
item.description:
It’s on the lampost by the stop
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tag, 10th April
item.description:
Over stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Shooters Hill, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Large lip/raised concrete across the path, 10th April
item.description:
There is an extreme lip or raised area along the pavement, so much so that my buggy nearly flipped forward when we went into it as I didn't know it was there. It's very dangerous and really needs to be fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
